violations.reason: The agent only raised a cash discrepancy report and informed Mr. Oakes that the machine will be audited within two working days.

violations.evidence: The agent did not investigate if there were any issues with the ATM machine used or the transaction itself.
violations.reason: The agent only raised a cash discrepancy report and did not ask any questions about the transaction or the ATM.

overall_summary: The agent failed to properly verify the customer's identity and did not investigate the ATM or transaction issues.

planted_violations: initially directed customer to branch unnecessarily; corrected before customer disconnected
overall_summary: The agent initially provided incorrect guidance but quickly corrected themselves and followed the relevant policies to address the customer's issue.
